version__comment: Schema version for project_config.json. Must be 1.

paths.data_root__comment: Project-relative root folder containing the CAESAR and SIZE_STREAM dataset folders.
paths.size_stream_dir__comment: Folder containing SS_OUT_*.obj meshes and the SizeStream XLSX landmark workbook.
paths.caesar_dir__comment: Folder containing CAESAR csr*.ply meshes and optional csr*.lnd landmark files.
paths.processed_dir__comment: Folder where registered meshes and transforms are saved.

paths__comment: Input and output directory settings. Edit these for each new project.

quality.fitness_fail_below__comment: Registrations below this fitness are marked as failed.
quality.excellent_rmse_below_mm__comment: RMSE threshold, in millimeters, for the Excellent quality label.
quality.acceptable_rmse_below_mm__comment: RMSE threshold, in millimeters, for the Acceptable quality label.

registration.quality__comment: Quality thresholds used when labeling registration results.

coarse_icp.max_correspondence_distance_mm__comment: Maximum correspondence distance, in millimeters, for the coarse ICP stage.
coarse_icp.max_iteration__comment: Maximum number of coarse ICP iterations.
coarse_icp.relative_fitness__comment: Early-stop threshold for relative fitness changes in coarse ICP.
coarse_icp.relative_rmse__comment: Early-stop threshold for relative RMSE changes in coarse ICP.

fine_icp.max_correspondence_distance_mm__comment: Maximum correspondence distance, in millimeters, for the fine ICP stage.
fine_icp.max_iteration__comment: Maximum number of fine ICP iterations.
fine_icp.relative_fitness__comment: Early-stop threshold for relative fitness changes in fine ICP.
fine_icp.relative_rmse__comment: Early-stop threshold for relative RMSE changes in fine ICP.

target_normals.radius_mm__comment: Neighborhood radius, in millimeters, used to estimate target normals for point-to-plane ICP.
target_normals.max_nn__comment: Maximum number of neighbors used to estimate target normals.

registration.target_normals__comment: Normal estimation settings for the SizeStream target point cloud.

sampling.max_points__comment: Maximum number of mesh vertices sampled into each ICP point cloud.
sampling.random_seed__comment: Random seed used for reproducible downsampling.

registration.sampling__comment: Sampling settings for the ICP point clouds.

registration__comment: ICP and quality parameters. Tune these when switching datasets.

distance.default_color_max_mm__comment: Default upper bound for the landmark distance heatmap color scale.
distance.slider_min_mm__comment: Minimum value allowed by the distance color scale slider.
distance.slider_max_mm__comment: Maximum value allowed by the distance color scale slider.

distance__comment: Distance heatmap defaults and slider limits.
